creator: stask@tiger.unisquad.com
text:
Oops, sorry, in previous post I should say "kmem_malloc()" instead
of "kern_malloc()".
Once more: kern_malloc() (vm/vm_kern.c) is referenced from m_mballoc()
(kern/uipc_mbuf.c) and probably returns wrong value.
1. kern_malloc() should work at splhigh.
2. kern_malloc() should be called only from malloc() (kern/kern_malloc.c)

\bye
Stas
